title: PERSONA.md frontmatter (AIP-25)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-25 PERSONA.md manifest. Single-doc, no oneOf — every persona is the same shape. The body is markdown and not validated by this schema.

schema.description: Schema dispatch tag. MUST be 'persona/v1' for this version of AIP-25.

name.description: Machine identifier. Lowercase, digits, dashes. Must start with a letter, end with a letter or digit. Unique within the registry that hosts the persona.

description.description: One-paragraph elevator pitch. The persona's purpose, audience, and shape.

version.description: Semver. Bump on breaking change to identity, voice, or boundaries.

extends.description: Relative path to a parent PERSONA.md. Triggers composition. Path MUST end in 'PERSONA.md'.

avatar.description: Public visual face. URL, data URI, or 'ws://avatars/<slug>' ref. Schema does not validate scheme; the loader resolves.

oneLineHook.description: Punchy elevator hook. One sentence the catalog can show next to the persona name.

background.description: Long-form lore prose, in markdown. The character's history, motivations, and context.

archetypes.description: Categorical archetype labels. Lowercase kebab-case. Examples: mentor, craftsman, sentinel, trickster. The catalog MAY cluster by these.

era.description: Free-form era label. Conventional values: 'contemporary', 'timeless', '<year>', '<year>-<year>', '<period>'. Free-form to accept any setting.

setting.description: Free-form setting label. Conventional values: 'real-world', 'fictional-<universe>'. Free-form to accept any setting.

register.description: Voice register. Conventional values: warm-direct, playful, terse, academic. Custom values welcome — free-form to accept any author label.

signaturePhrases.description: Catchphrases the character uses. Append-and-dedupe under extends — lineage accumulates phrases.

tonality.description: Tonal adjectives. Examples: rigorous, encouraging, dry, warm. Append-and-dedupe under extends.

formality.description: Formality scale, 0 (extremely casual) to 10 (extremely formal). Optional.

emojiUsage.description: Emoji posture. 'never' = no emojis ever; 'sparing' = occasional, intentional; 'frequent' = part of the voice.

signOff.description: Sign-off the persona uses to close messages. Examples: '—M.', 'Yours, Marcus', 'Until next time'.

refuses.description: Topics the persona refuses outright. Free-form prose; the persona body SHOULD demonstrate the refusal posture in voice samples. Append-and-dedupe under extends.

defers.description: Topics the persona defers to a specialist on. Append-and-dedupe under extends.

to.description: Redirect target. ws:// ref to a persona/operator/skill, or a relative path.

notes.description: Optional prose describing why the redirect exists.

redirects.description: Topic-to-target redirects. Merge-by-`topic` under extends — child entry with same topic replaces parent's.

multilingual.description: Fallback locales. BCP-47. Append-and-dedupe under extends.

persona.description: ws:// ref to another persona/v1 manifest in the registry.

kind.description: Relationship kind. Conventional values: mentor-of, peer-of, mentee-of, rival-of, partner-of. Free-form to accept any author label.

relationships.description: Named relationships to other personas. Merge-by-`persona` under extends — child entry with same ref replaces parent's.

identity.description: Optional AIP-23 identity workspace ref. The persona's inner substance.

items.description: Cross-AIP ref. Operator (AIP-9), skill (AIP-3), assembly seat (AIP-24), or relative path.

appliesTo.description: Bind this persona to specific consumers. Local-only — not inherited under extends.

tags.description: Catalog tags. Lowercase kebab-case. Append-and-dedupe under extends.

metadata.description: Vendor extensions, namespaced under <vendor>. Hosts MUST tolerate unknown keys; vendor namespaces MUST NOT override the meaning of fields defined in this AIP.
